The boss revealed in his pre-match press conference that Marcos Rojo - who made his return from injury against Basel - is in contention to feature on Saturday. Mourinho also stated Paul Pogba cannot play for longer than 65/70 minutes currently, while Zlatan Ibrahimovic is not ready to start, but he could make another 15/20 minute cameo appearance. The manager also admitted Eric Bailly and Phil Jones would both be unavailable for the match. However, Antonio Valencia, Juan Mata and Ashley Young could all return to the squad after not travelling to Switzerland, though Michael Carrick is likely to continue to miss out. Meanwhile, Brighton manager Chris Hughton has an almost full squad at his disposal, with Steve Sidwell the only player not training at the moment.
